findings.description: The image prominently displays '../音楽/どんぐりころころ.mp3' as large bold display text (the canonical path example). figure::4 captures this as a caption ('パス指定例: ../音楽/どんぐりころころ.mp3'), which is accurate, but the visual emphasis (large bold typography) is not representable in the JSON schema — acceptable omission.

reviewer_notes: Six entities accurately cover the page: section header 12-02 (ルール4), the parent-directory concept explanation, the directory-tree diagram with all filenames (どんぐりころころ.mp3, ぞうさん.mp3, おもちゃのチャチャチャ.mp3, バナナ.jpg, みかん.jpg, りんご.jpg), the path display, and the ./ vs ../ usage explanation. The figure::2 caption faithfully enumerates all nodes of the tree. JP surfaces, zh translations, and en translations are all accurate. The page cuts off mid-sentence at the bottom, which is handled correctly — term::5 definition is complete for the visible content.
